ExcelExpert.trigger: Industrial data manipulation and spreadsheet automation.
ExcelExpert.logic: Use when query involves spreadsheets, formulas, data tables, pivot analysis, charts, or numeric reporting.
example_inputs: Add a SUM formula to column D rows 2 through 50
Create a pivot table from Sheet1 grouped by Category
Format all headers in row 1 as bold with blue background
Generate a bar chart comparing Q1 vs Q2 sales
Apply conditional formatting to highlight values above 1000
ExcelExpert.example_outputs: Returns Office.js JavaScript snippet + brief explanation of what was applied.
ExcelExpert.edge_cases: If the sheet name or cell range is not provided, infer from the active selection in officeContext. If officeContext is empty, ask the user to specify the target range.
ExcelExpert.input_format: { query: string, activeCell?: string, selectedRange?: string, sheetName?: string }

PPT-Master.trigger: High-fidelity slide layout and UI/UX logic.
PPT-Master.logic: Use when user refers to slides, presentations, decks, visual layouts, or PowerPoint design.
example_inputs: Add a title slide with the company logo on the right
Create a 3-column comparison layout for slide 4
Generate a timeline slide showing Q1–Q4 milestones
Apply the Industrial Zenith theme to all slides
Add speaker notes summarising the key points on slide 2
PPT-Master.example_outputs: Returns Office.js code to manipulate the active presentation + design rationale.
PPT-Master.edge_cases: If slide index is not specified, target the currently selected slide. If no presentation is open, ask the user to open one.
PPT-Master.input_format: { query: string, slideIndex?: number, selectedText?: string }

WordExpert.trigger: Document writing, editing, and high-fidelity formatting.
WordExpert.logic: Use when query involves Word documents, reports, memos, structured text editing, or formatting.
example_inputs: Write an executive summary for this quarterly report
Format all H2 headings in the document as bold with 14pt font
Insert a table of contents at the beginning
Rewrite the selected paragraph in a more formal tone
Add numbered footnotes to the highlighted citations
WordExpert.example_outputs: Returns formatted content ready to insert, or Office.js code to apply changes to the active document.
WordExpert.edge_cases: If the document has no content (empty officeContext.documentText), ask the user what they want to write before proceeding.
WordExpert.input_format: { query: string, selectionText?: string, documentText?: string }

VectorNexus.trigger: General semantic search across development docs.
VectorNexus.logic: Use when user asks 'What is X?' or 'Find documentation about Y' with no Office-specific context.
example_inputs: What does the XLOOKUP function do?
Find documentation about Office.js Range API
VectorNexus.example_outputs: Returns ranked list of relevant document snippets with source references.
VectorNexus.edge_cases: Fall back to TurboSearch if VectorNexus latency exceeds 5 seconds.
VectorNexus.input_format: { apiKey: string, query: string, docs: string[] }

TripleTierSearch.logic: Use when query contains specific variable names, function signatures, or terminal commands requiring reranking.
example_inputs: Find all usages of context.workbook.getSelectedRange()
Search for RATE_LIMIT_RPM across the config files
TripleTierSearch.example_outputs: Returns reranked results with precision score and source location.
TripleTierSearch.edge_cases: Only use when keyword search would produce too many false positives.

TurboSearch.logic: Use when speed is prioritised over precision, or as fallback when VectorNexus is unavailable.
example_inputs: Quick search for 'rate limiter' in the backend source
TurboSearch.example_outputs: Returns file paths and line excerpts matching the keyword.

GalaxyGraph.trigger: Impact analysis and entity relationship mapping.
GalaxyGraph.logic: Use when user asks 'What is related to X?' or 'If I change Y, what breaks?' or needs dependency analysis.
example_inputs: If I rename the ClientManager class, what files will break?
Show all modules that depend on skill-orchestrator.ts
What is related to the rate limiter middleware?
GalaxyGraph.example_outputs: Returns a JSON graph of affected nodes with relationship type and risk level.
GalaxyGraph.edge_cases: Requires repo path. If repo is not provided, use the current working directory.

VisionExpert.trigger: Visual content analysis of slides and diagrams.
VisionExpert.logic: Use when document contains unparsed images, flowcharts, architecture diagrams, or screenshots that need interpretation.
example_inputs: Describe the architecture diagram in slide 3
Extract the data from this screenshot of an Excel table
What does this flowchart show?
VisionExpert.example_outputs: Returns structured description of the visual content including extracted data if applicable.
VisionExpert.edge_cases: Requires image path or base64 data. Cannot process password-protected or encrypted images.

CrossHostBridge.trigger: Cross-app sync: Excel → PPT, Excel → Word, PPT → Word, etc.
CrossHostBridge.logic: Use when user wants to transfer, mirror, or synchronise data across Office applications.
example_inputs: Take the sales data from Sheet1 in Excel and create a PPT bar chart
Export the Excel table to a formatted Word report
Sync the presentation title with the Word document header
CrossHostBridge.example_outputs: Returns status object with source_read, transform_applied, and target_written fields.
CrossHostBridge.edge_cases: Requires both source and target file paths. If either is missing, infer from officeContext or ask the user.
CrossHostBridge.input_format: { sourceApp: 'excel'|'ppt'|'word', targetApp: 'excel'|'ppt'|'word', sourcePath?: string, targetPath?: string, query: string }

DesignReviewer.trigger: 5-Dimension Expert Panel review gate for PPT and Word output quality.
DesignReviewer.logic: Automatically applied to ppt/word skill outputs. Scores across Information Architecture (25), Visual Poetry (20), Emotional Resonance (20), Usability & Legibility (20), Brand Consistency (15). Pass threshold: 70/100. On fail, returns structured issues for refinement.
example_inputs: Review this PPT output for design quality
Check if the Word report meets professional standards
Score the slide layout against the 5-dimension rubric
Validate the document structure before sending to user
Does this presentation pass the quality gate?
DesignReviewer.example_outputs: Returns { totalScore, passed, dimensions[], allIssues[], refinementHint } — used internally by skill-orchestrator.
DesignReviewer.edge_cases: Review is always run in-process before returning PPT/Word results. Never exposed directly to end users as a standalone chat command.

BrandExtractor.trigger: Extract corporate brand color palette from a company URL for CI-aligned slide and document generation.
BrandExtractor.logic: Use when user provides a company website URL and wants the AI output to match their brand colors. Supports query prefix 'brand: https://...'
example_inputs: brand: https://www.apple.com
brand: https://www.microsoft.com
Extract the brand colors from https://company.com and use them in the presentation
Match our company website colors: https://example.corp
Use our brand palette from https://design.acme.io
BrandExtractor.example_outputs: Returns BrandTokens { primary, secondary, accent, background, text, cssBlock, sourceUrl } for immediate injection into PPT Design Tokens or CSS custom properties.
BrandExtractor.edge_cases: Only HTTPS URLs are supported. Extraction is lightweight (HTML parsing only); for pixel-level analysis delegate to VisionExpert. Falls back to Nexus default palette if extraction yields no non-neutral colors.
